query:
SELECT 
  tc.id,
  tc.notionPageId,
  tc.site,
  tc.task,
  tc.completedAt,
  tc.createdAt,
  tc.updatedAt
FROM taskCompletion tc
WHERE tc.site LIKE '%RMC Anniston%' OR tc.site LIKE '%Anniston Radiology%'
LIMIT 10;
